---
title: "Lectures"
---

Updated daily before lecture.

<!--
## Contents
 

|            | Date    | Title                                                     | Materials                                |
|------------|---------|-----------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| Lecture 0  | June 1  | Welcome to CMSACamp 2026                                      | [slides](lectures/00-welcome.qmd)        |
| Lecture 1  | June 3  | Exploring data: into the `tidyverse`                      | [slides](lectures/01-explore.qmd)        |
| Lecture 2  | June 4  | Data visualization: the grammar of graphics and `ggplot2` | [slides](lectures/02-graphics.qmd)       |
| Lecture 3  | June 5  | Data visualization: categorical data                      | [slides](lectures/03-categorical.qmd)    |
| Lecture 4  | June 6  | Data visualization: quantitative data                     | [slides](lectures/04-quantitative.qmd)   |
| Lecture 5  | June 9  | Unsupervised learning: principal component analysis       | [slides](lectures/05-pca.qmd)            |
| Lecture 6  | June 10 | Unsupervised learning: $k$-means clustering               | [slides](lectures/06-kmeans.qmd)         |
| Lecture 7  | June 11 | Unsupervised learning: hierarchical clustering            | [slides](lectures/07-hierarchical.qmd)   |
| Lecture 8  | June 12 | Data visualization: density estimation                    | [slides](lectures/08-density.qmd)        |
| Lecture 9  | June 13 | Presentations                                             | [slides](lectures/09-presentation.qmd)   |
| Lecture 10 | June 16 | Simulation                                                | [slides](lectures/10-simulation.qmd)     |
| Lecture 11 | June 17 | Supervised learning: linear regression                    | [slides](lectures/11-linear.qmd)         |
| Lecture 12 | June 20 | Supervised learning: model building                       | [slides](lectures/12-building.qmd)       |
| Lecture 13 | June 23 | Data wrangling with R's `data.table` package              | [slides](lectures/13-datatable.qmd)      |
| Lecture 14 | June 24 | Supervised learning: regularization                       | [slides](lectures/14-regularization.qmd) |
| Lecture 15 | June 25 | Supervised learning: logistic regression                  | [slides](lectures/15-logistic.qmd)       |
| Lecture 16 | June 26 | Supervised learning: generalized linear models            | [slides](lectures/16-glm.qmd)            |
| Lecture 17 | June 27 | The command line and `git`                                | [slides](lectures/17-cli-git.qmd)        |
| Lecture 18 | June 30 | Unsupervised learning: Gaussian mixture models            | [slides](lectures/18-mixture.qmd)        |
| Lecture 19 | July 1  | Supervised learning: nonparametric regression             | [slides](lectures/19-nonparametric.qmd)  |
| Lecture 20 | July 7  | Supervised learning: decision trees                       | [slides](lectures/20-trees.qmd)          |
| Lecture 21 | July 8  | Supervised learning: bagging and boosting                 | [slides](lectures/21-ensemble.qmd)       |
| Lecture 22 | July 9  | Building a website with Quarto                            | [slides](lectures/22-website.qmd)        | -->


<!--

| Lecture 21 | XXXXXXX | Supervised learning: multinomial classification           | [slides](lectures/21-multinomial.qmd)    |

-->
